import sys
from PIL import Image, ImageEnhance
import pytesseract

def preprocess_image(image_path):
    img = Image.open(image_path)
    img = img.convert('L')
    enhancer = ImageEnhance.Contrast(img)
    img = enhancer.enhance(2)
    width, height = img.size
    if width < 300:
        new_width = 300
        ratio = new_width / width
        new_height = int(height * ratio)
        img = img.resize((new_width, new_height), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
    img = img.point(lambda x: 0 if x < 128 else 255, '1')
    return img

def extract_grid(img):
    width, height = img.size
    cell_w = width // 9
    cell_h = height // 9
    grid = [[0 for _ in range(9)] for _ in range(9)]
    for i in range(9):
        for j in range(9):
            left = j * cell_w
            upper = i * cell_h
            right = left + cell_w
            lower = upper + cell_h
            cell = img.crop((left, upper, right, lower))
            custom_config = r'--oem 3 --psm 10 -c tessedit_char_whitelist=123456789'
            cell_text = pytesseract.image_to_string(cell, config=custom_config).strip()
            if cell_text.isdigit() and len(cell_text) == 1:
                grid[i][j] = int(cell_text)
            else:
                grid[i][j] = 0
    return grid

img = preprocess_image('/app/sudoku.jpeg')
extracted = extract_grid(img)
print('Extracted given numbers:')
for row in extracted:
    print(row)

with open('/app/solution.txt') as f:
    solution = [[int(x) for x in line.strip().split()] for line in f]
print('\nSolution:')
for row in solution:
    print(row)

mismatch = False
for i in range(9):
    for j in range(9):
        if extracted[i][j] != 0 and extracted[i][j] != solution[i][j]:
            print(f'Mismatch at ({i},{j}): extracted {extracted[i][j]}, solution {solution[i][j]}')
            mismatch = True
if not mismatch:
    print('\nAll given numbers match solution.')
EOF

    },
